parameters.idea: We want to build a mobile expense tracker app for small business owners...

content.execution_summary:
• Produced 6 FRs, 1 NFR, 2 constraints, 2 assumptions, 2 gaps, 2 dependencies, 2 data requirements, 2 integrations, 2 success metrics, 2 risks (21 total)
• Key decisions: classified offline/sync as NFR-Reliability (not FR); AWS/React Native as constraints (not requirements)
• Reflection: initially had FR-04 (reports) as Must-Have — downgraded to Should-Have. Added OCR dependency and risk which were initially missed.
• PRD uploaded to /wf-expense-001/prd/prd-smartexpense.md
• 2 gaps need stakeholder input: authentication approach and data retention/export requirements.
• Knowledge bases consulted: kb-L1-prd-document-template (used as PRD structure template)
• Guardrails evaluated: gr-L1-output-schema-validator (pass), gr-L1-pii-detection (pass)
• Tools invoked: tool-L1-azure-blob-writer (success — PRD uploaded)
